## Provenance

Classification (select one):

- [ ] Original implementation
- [ ] Derived or ported implementation
- [ ] Inherited upstream-only change

For derived or ported work, complete every field:

```text
Upstream-Project:
Upstream-Repository:
Upstream-Commit:
Upstream-Path:
Original-Author:
License:
Ported-By:
Adaptation-Notes:
```

For an independent implementation that resembles work elsewhere, link the
dated issue, crash report, design notes, or tests that establish independent
development.

- [ ] I reviewed `PROVENANCE.md`.
- [ ] I preserved all applicable copyright, author, source, and license notices.
- [ ] I did not replace an upstream/source marker with a Canvas marker.
- [ ] I checked the fully applied source, not only the patch-file diff.
